issues.sample: WHILE BRAKING TO STOP FOR A TRAFFIC LIGHT ON A BUSY 45 MPH SPEED LIMIT ROAD, THE ENGINE STOPPED RUNNING.  I SHIFTED INTO PARK TO RESTART IT.  ENTIRE ELECTRICAL SYSTEM WAS DEAD EXCEPT POWER SEATS AND DOOR LOCKS.  ENGINE WOULD NOT START AND NO OTHER ELECTRICAL RELATED EQUIPMENT WOR

GENERAL MOTORS  NEVER NOTIFIED ME OF A RECALL ON MY 2015 BUICK ENCORE IN SEPT 2016.  I FOUND OUT ABOUT THE RECALL BY READING IT IN THE NEWSPAPER. IT INVOLVED THE AIR BAG.  I CALLED MY LOCAL DEALER AND THEY MADE THE REPAIR.  I CALLED GM AND ASKED WHY THEY DIDN'T NOTIFY ME. THEY HA

narrative.headline: What 2015 Buick Encore owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 122 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (25% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
